name: scaffold-core
description: Tinyland house-style scaffold core plugin. Six skills covering cold-landing classification, spoke spawning, drift audit, repo contract, static-spoke customization, and cache-first Bazel.
notes: Skill bodies are canonical at .agents/skills/<name>/SKILL.md in the repo root.
plugins/scaffold-core/skills/* are symlinks to those canonical files so the plugin is git-subdir-installable.
.claude/skills/* are sibling symlinks used by Claude Code's repo-walk discovery.
When editing a skill, edit .agents/skills/<name>/SKILL.md. The symlinks resolve automatically.
